items.title: Stock Market News for Sep 17, 2025
items.description: U.S. stocks ended lower on Tuesday in a choppy trading session, as investors remained cautious ahead of the Federal Reserve's decision on interest rates at the end of its two-day policy meeting on Wednesday.

items.title: You Don't Need To Follow The AI Crowd For Investment Success
Optum Rx hikes payment floor on brand name drugs for independent pharmacies
items.description: The move builds on the major PBM’s pivot to cost-based pricing for pharmacies announced earlier this year.

items.title: This Infusion Therapy Leader Is Undervalued. Buy the Stock.
items.description: For millions of people living with chronic disease or acute illness, the choice to receive treatment anywhere other than a hospital is an easy one.  Option Care Health  is capitalizing on the growing demand for at-home and alternate-site medical services.  The Bannockburn, Ill.-based company is the nation’s largest provider of infusion therapies, administering often complex medications at patients’ homes or at one of its more than 170 ambulatory clinics across the U.S.
